title: Phase 0: Core types, errors, and JSON helpers
description: Port all 72 types from reference/types.ts to src/types.rs with serde derives. Port error types to src/errors.rs using thiserror. Port JSON output envelope to src/json.rs. All types must round-trip through serde_json. Use #[serde(rename_all = camelCase)] for JSON compat. File scope: src/types.rs, src/errors.rs, src/json.rs

title: Phase 0: YAML config loader
description: Port reference/config.ts to src/config.rs. Must: find .overstory/config.yaml by walking up from CWD, merge config.local.yaml if present, apply DEFAULT_CONFIG for missing fields, validate config values, support --project flag override. Handle git worktree detection for resolving project root. File scope: src/config.rs
closeReason: Config.rs integrated via fix-lead (grove-71cd). Original config-builder branch content extracted and adapted.

title: Phase 0: Database layer (5 stores)
description: Port all 5 database stores to src/db/. Includes: connection.rs (shared WAL opener), sessions.rs (SessionStore + RunStore), mail.rs (MailStore), events.rs (EventStore), metrics.rs (MetricsStore), merge_queue.rs (MergeQueue), and mod.rs. Each store creates tables idempotently, provides CRUD methods matching the TypeScript interfaces. All use rusqlite synchronously. Write unit tests with in-memory SQLite. File scope: src/db/mod.rs, src/db/connection.rs, src/db/sessions.rs, src/db/mail.rs, src/db/events.rs, src/db/metrics.rs, src/db/merge_queue.rs
closeReason: Database layer merged via db-integrate-builder (clean-merge). 7 db modules, 129 tests.

title: Phase 0: Logging, CLI skeleton with all 35 commands
description: Port reference/color.ts + reference/theme.ts to src/logging/mod.rs. Implement brand palette (BrandGreen #2e7d32, AccentAmber #ffb74d, MutedGray #78786e), print_success/error/warning/hint helpers, state colors/icons, format_duration, format_relative_time, strip_ansi, visible_length. Port CLI skeleton to src/main.rs with clap derive macros. All 35 commands as subcommands, each printing 'not yet implemented'. Global flags: --project, --quiet, --json, --verbose. grove --help must print all commands. File scope: src/logging/mod.rs, src/main.rs

title: Fix: revert bad config merge, integrate config.rs properly
description: CRITICAL FIX: The auto-resolve merge of overstory/config-builder/grove-c37a (commit bcf090e) displaced content from prior merges. types.rs dropped from 1413 to 495 lines, main.rs from 626 to 79 lines. Steps: (1) git revert bcf090e -m 1 to restore the types-lead and cli-lead content. (2) Extract ONLY src/config.rs from the config-builder branch (git show overstory/config-builder/grove-c37a:src/config.rs). (3) Add mod declarations to main.rs: mod types; mod errors; mod json; mod config; (these were lost in earlier auto-resolve). (4) The config.rs may reference types from its own types.rs — update imports to use crate::types and crate::errors instead. (5) Ensure cargo build compiles clean, cargo test passes, cargo clippy clean. File scope: src/main.rs, src/config.rs (and minor fixups to types.rs/errors.rs if config needs additional types not in the authoritative types.rs).
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/fix-builder/grove-71cd (clean-merge). Reverted bad auto-resolve, integrated config.rs properly.

title: Integrate database layer from db-builder branch
description: Extract the database layer files from overstory/db-builder/grove-3e48 branch and integrate with current main. The db-builder branch has its own types.rs/errors.rs/main.rs that will conflict with main. Steps: (1) Extract src/db/ directory files from db-builder branch: mod.rs, connection.rs, sessions.rs, mail.rs, events.rs, metrics.rs, merge_queue.rs. (2) Add 'mod db;' declaration to src/main.rs. (3) Adapt db modules to use crate::types and crate::errors from the authoritative versions on main. The db modules may need types that exist in db-builder's types.rs but not in main's — add any missing types. (4) Ensure cargo build, cargo test, cargo clippy all pass. File scope: src/db/*, src/main.rs, src/types.rs (additions only).
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/db-integrate-builder/grove-a60b (clean-merge). DB integration complete.

title: Phase 1: status + costs commands
description: Implement src/commands/status.rs and src/commands/costs.rs per docs/phase-1.md. Both are read-only commands querying sessions.db, mail.db, merge-queue.db, metrics.db. Must support --json output matching the spec schemas. Test against real .overstory/ data. Quality gates: cargo build, cargo test, cargo clippy -- -D warnings.

title: Phase 1: mail command (list/check/read)
description: Implement src/commands/mail.rs with 3 subcommands: list, check, read. Per docs/phase-1.md spec. Read-only commands querying mail.db. Support --json output, --inject format for check, filtering flags. Test against real .overstory/ mail.db data. Quality gates: cargo build, cargo test, cargo clippy -- -D warnings.

title: Phase 1: doctor command + main.rs wiring + mod.rs
description: Implement src/commands/doctor.rs (system health checks per docs/phase-1.md), create src/commands/mod.rs exposing all command modules, and wire status/mail/costs/doctor into main.rs replacing not_yet_implemented stubs. Must update clap arg types for Doctor/Mail/Costs from PassthroughArgs to proper typed args. Quality gates: cargo build, cargo test, cargo clippy -- -D warnings.

title: Fix merge artifacts: add missing DoctorArgs + mod.rs declarations
description: Auto-resolve merge dropped content. Fix: (1) Add DoctorArgs struct to main.rs (json: bool, verbose: bool, category: Option<String>). (2) Add 'pub mod doctor;' and 'pub mod mail;' to src/commands/mod.rs. Must pass cargo build, cargo test, cargo clippy -- -D warnings.

title: Phase 2: mail send/reply/purge write commands
description: Extend src/commands/mail.rs with send, reply, and purge subcommands. Add proper arg structs to main.rs replacing PassthroughArgs for Send/Reply/Purge. Reference: reference/mail-command.ts. See docs/phase-2.md deliverable 1.
closeReason: Implemented execute_send, execute_reply, execute_purge in mail.rs; wired MailSendArgs/MailReplyArgs/MailPurgeArgs in main.rs. All 170 tests pass, clippy clean.

title: Phase 2: merge command + resolver with content-displacement detection
description: Implement grove merge command and the merge resolver. New files: src/merge/mod.rs, src/merge/resolver.rs, src/commands/merge.rs. Add MergeOutcome, DisplacedHunk, ConflictResolution types to src/types.rs. Implements tiers 1-2 (clean merge + auto-resolve with ContentDisplaced detection). Reference: reference/merge-resolver.ts (1125 lines). See docs/phase-2.md deliverable 5. Wire merge command in main.rs.

title: Phase 2: clean, stop, nudge, init, hooks, spec commands
description: Implement 6 new command modules: clean.rs, stop.rs, nudge.rs, init.rs, hooks.rs, spec.rs. Register in commands/mod.rs and wire in main.rs. Reference files in reference/. See docs/phase-2.md deliverables 2-4, 6-8.

title: Phase 2: fix-up merge artifacts on shared files
description: After merging the 3 parallel Phase 2 leads, fix any merge artifacts on shared files (main.rs, commands/mod.rs, types.rs). Verify cargo build, cargo test, cargo clippy all pass. This is a sequenced task — only start after the other 3 Phase 2 branches are merged.
